top_signals.title: UBS’ MacLeod on Markets, Investor Sentiment
top_signals.summary: Niall MacLeod, Head of APAC Product at UBS, discusses the outlook for macro markets and investor sentiment. He speaks with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

alerts.title: UBS’ MacLeod on Markets, Investor Sentiment
alerts.summary: Niall MacLeod, Head of APAC Product at UBS, discusses the outlook for macro markets and investor sentiment. He speaks with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)
